title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: ZimaBoard 2 is a compact self-hosting device that runs Zima OS and enables local deployment of AI applications. The video demonstrates setting it up with OpenClaw, Venice AI, and Telegram bot integration for sovereign AI infrastructure without cloud vendor lock-in.
